MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Paul Gaviria, 415-239-4159 for defendant and moving party appearing propria persona
Arnold Evje II, Esq., 415-508-0187, for plaintiff and opposing party Peter Chin

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT PAUL GAVIRIA'S NOTICE Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons IS DENIED IN LIGHT OF EVIDENCE OF PERSONAL SERVICE. DEFENDANT TO RESPOND TO COMPLAINT WITHIN 5 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
